creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
Thank you.  However there seems to be a regression in checking
certificiate expiration dates.  It would good if we could bisect the
changes and find out where the problem comes from.

 Certificate Expiration       Failed conversion of ``2018-06-07 02:20'' using format ``%F %H:%M %z''
date: illegal time format
usage: date [-jnRu] [-d dst] [-r seconds] [-t west] [-v[+|-]val[ymwdHMS]] ... 
            [-f fmt date | [[[[[cc]yy]mm]dd]HH]MM[.ss]] [+format]
-17601 >= 30 days (UTC: 2018-03-09 01:20 --> 2018-06-07 02:20)
